# komodor_policy_v2 (Data Source)

Retrieves an existing Komodor RBAC Policy by name



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
